info.name: Circle Web3 Services (W3S) — Developer-Controlled Wallets API

description.content:
Circle's Web3 Services API for developer-controlled programmable wallets, wallet sets,
signing, transactions, tokens, and NFTs. This is a best-effort partial spec derived
from Circle's published OpenAPI at
https://developers.circle.com/openapi/developer-controlled-wallets.yaml.

Contact Support:
 Name: Circle Developer Support
